name: Wok Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat wok over medium heat.
2. Divide the package of cake mix in half and mix according to recipe directions.
3. Lightly grease and flour one 9-inch cake pan.
4. Pour the cake mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Set the pan in the preheated wok.
6. Cook for the time suggested in the recipe.
DO NOT LIFT THE LID WHILE COOKING.
Cook one layer at a time.
